chatGPTEstimates.info: Estimated U.S. Average: 29.3 GPT-3 queries per 500 ml (Ren et al. 2023). Note: this takes into account first, second and third-scope water use, including water used in cooling, constructing and making the data center and its components.
Google Cloud Report on Environmental Impacts of AI. Note: this is an estimate for the water used per inference, only taking into account first-scope use for cooling a data center
CEO estimate from blog post (June 2025 archive). Note: this is only the water used for the query itself, not the training or other operations.
